title: uragoga pumila
intro: Uragoga pumila, also known as the dwarf uragoga or pumila uragoga, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in some parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of uragoga pumila are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Uragoga pumila is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
